hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ]; then echo '⚠️  REMINDER: You are on main. Create a feature branch before making changes: git checkout -b feat/description'; fi
hooks.description: Warn when working directly on main

hooks.command: echo '📝 REMINDER: Commit format: type(scope): description\nTypes: feat fix refactor test docs chore\nAlso update CLAUDE.md §7 before this session ends.'
hooks.description: Remind about commit format and CLAUDE.md

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ]; then echo '❌ BLOCKER: Cannot push directly to main. Create a feature branch first.'; exit 1; fi
if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo '❌ BLOCKER: Uncommitted changes. Commit before pushing.'; exit 1; fi
echo '📋 REMINDER: Run /pre-pr first to verify all gates pass before creating the PR.'
hooks.description: Remind to run /pre-pr before creating a PR

hooks.command: git status --porcelain | grep -q . && echo '⚠️  Session ending with uncommitted changes. Run /end-work to finish cleanly.' || echo '✅ Clean session end — no uncommitted changes.'
hooks.description: Check for uncommitted work at session end
